channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza, Any Crust for $9.99
item.description: Get any Domino's pizza with any crust—including Parmesan Stuffed Crust—and up to 7 toppings for just $9.99 when you order online or in the app. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Arby's: Any Slider for $1.99
item.description: Score any Arby's Slider for just $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time. (Limited time)

item.title: Arby's: $7.99 Meat & 3 Box
item.description: Choose a Crispy Chicken Sandwich or Ham & Swiss Melt plus three sides and a small drink—all for $7.99. (Ongoing)

item.title: Subway: Moana Movie Meal Deal — $1 Upgrade for $15 Fandango Code
item.guid: Subway-Moana Movie Meal Deal — $1 Upgrade for $-2026-07-07
item.description: Upgrade any combo meal for just $1 more to receive a collectible Moana cup and a $15 Fandango promo code for the film. (Through August 19, 2026)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 Value Meal Box
item.description: Get a McDouble or McChicken plus 4-piece McNuggets, small fries, and a small drink for $5 via the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Dunkin': $6 Meal Deal — Coffee + 2 Wake-Up Wraps
item.guid: Dunkin'-$6 Meal Deal — Coffee + 2 Wake-Up Wraps-2026-07-07
item.description: Grab a medium hot or iced coffee and two Wake-Up Wrap Sandwiches together for just $6. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: The Luxe Cravings Box packs a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips with nacho cheese, and a medium drink for $5.99 via the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wendy's: $5 Biggie Bag
item.description: Choose a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger or Crispy Chicken BLT plus 4-piece nuggets, Jr. fries, and a small drink for $5. (Ongoing)

item.title: Salad and Go: Fresh Drive-Thru Salads from $5.74
item.guid: Salad and Go-Fresh Drive-Thru Salads from $5.74-2026-07-07
item.description: Salad and Go's drive-thru-only menu offers chef-crafted salads, wraps, and superfood smoothies starting at $5.74—healthy fast food you never have to leave the car for. (Ongoing)

item.title: Subway: 6-Inch Deli Faves for $3.99
item.description: New 6-inch Deli Faves subs are available for just $3.99—an everyday value option at participating Subway locations. (Ongoing)
